articles.title: Dangerous heat index levels in 28 areas, Pagasa warns
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines – Twenty-eight areas in the country will experience sweltering temperatures due to a danger-level heat index, the weather bureau said Saturday. Heat index is what the temperature feels like to the human body when relative humidity combines with air. READ: Heat Index: Why Cebuanos should not take the heat for granted A peak heat index of 44°C is forecast in Laoag, Ilocos Norte; Camiling, Tarlac; Sangley Point, Cavite City, Cavite; Cuyo, Palawan; Roxas City, Capiz; and Dumangas, Iloilo, according to the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA). The following areas will also see danger-level heat indices: NAIA, [...]... Keep on reading: Dangerous heat index levels in 28 areas, Pagasa warns

articles.title: Ash cloud rises from Mount Dukono eruption in Indonesia – video
articles.description: A large ash cloud rose into the air after Mount Dukono erupted on Indonesia’s eastern Halmahera island on Friday. Three hikers have died and 10 are missing in an area declared off-limits to visitors last month after scientists observed an increase in volcanic activity. articles.title: The gilded dead: Germany's eerie catacomb saints revealed

articles.title: Water levels on river Rhine in Germany rising after rain but vessels still part loaded
articles.description: HAMBURG, May 8 (Reuters) - Rain ⁠has raised water levels on the river Rhine ⁠in Germany enabling vessels to sail with more ‌cargo after shallow water hindered shipping this week, but sailings with full loads are still not possible, commodity traders said on Friday.
